game_info.title: Twist Jump 3D
game_info.concept:
Stay on the platforms and do as many jumps as you can.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/twist/id1052231801

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Stay on the platforms and do as many jumps as you can.

Just tap the screen to jump and twist the platforms. Try not to fall off the edges!

Collect gems to unlock new balls and platform colors.

What is your best score ?
game_info.description: Twist Jump 3D is a high-speed arcade runner where you control a ball rolling along a twisting, fragmented path in the void. The platforms are arranged in a cylindrical tunnel. You must rotate the entire world to align the platforms beneath the ball and jump over gaps to survive. As you progress, the speed increases and the path becomes more treacherous. Collect glowing gems to increase your score.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / A: Rotate the world left
- Arrow Right / D: Rotate the world right
- Space / Arrow Up / W: Jump
- Enter: Start the game
- R: Restart the game (after game over)
- Esc: Pause / Unpause

TEST_1.test_description: Verify that the game starts correctly and transitions to the PLAYING phase.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate pressing the ENTER key when in the START phase and check the gameState.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The gamePhase should change from "START" to "PLAYING", and the player entity should be initialized.
TEST_1.description: Verify that the game starts correctly and transitions to the PLAYING phase.
TEST_1.strategy: Simulate pressing the ENTER key when in the START phase and check the gameState.
TEST_1.expected: The gamePhase should change from "START" to "PLAYING", and the player entity should be initialized.

test_1_ModeBtn.expected: The gamePhase should change from "START" to "PLAYING", and the player entity should be initialized.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify that the jump mechanic applies vertical velocity to the player.
TEST_2.strategy_description: While playing and grounded, simulate a SPACE key press. Monitor the player's vertical velocity.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player's vertical velocity should become positive immediately after the jump input.
TEST_2.description: Verify that the jump mechanic applies vertical velocity to the player.
TEST_2.strategy: While playing and grounded, simulate a SPACE key press. Monitor the player's vertical velocity.
TEST_2.expected: The player's vertical velocity should become positive immediately after the jump input.

test_2_ModeBtn.test_description: Verify that the jump mechanic applies vertical velocity to the player.

test_2_ModeBtn.description: Verify that the jump mechanic applies vertical velocity to the player.
test_2_ModeBtn.strategy: While playing and grounded, simulate a SPACE key press. Monitor the player's vertical velocity.
test_2_ModeBtn.expected: The player's vertical velocity should become positive immediately after the jump input.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify world rotation logic when input keys are pressed.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Simulate holding the RIGHT ARROW key for a few frames and observe the `worldRotation` value.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The `worldRotation` value should change (increase or decrease) reflecting the input.
TEST_3.description: Verify world rotation logic when input keys are pressed.
TEST_3.strategy: Simulate holding the RIGHT ARROW key for a few frames and observe the `worldRotation` value.
TEST_3.expected: The `worldRotation` value should change (increase or decrease) reflecting the input.

test_3_ModeBtn.test_description: Verify world rotation logic when input keys are pressed.
test_3_ModeBtn.strategy_description: Simulate holding the RIGHT ARROW key for a few frames and observe the `worldRotation` value.
test_3_ModeBtn.expected_outcome: The `worldRotation` value should change (increase or decrease) reflecting the input.
test_3_ModeBtn.description: Verify world rotation logic when input keys are pressed.
test_3_ModeBtn.strategy: Simulate holding the RIGHT ARROW key for a few frames and observe the `worldRotation` value.
test_3_ModeBtn.expected: The `worldRotation` value should change (increase or decrease) reflecting the input.

TEST_4.test_description: Verify collision detection keeps the player grounded on a platform.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Ensure the world rotation aligns a platform directly under the player. Advance time.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The player's Y position should remain at the platform surface level (radius distance), and `onGround` should be true.
TEST_4.description: Verify collision detection keeps the player grounded on a platform.
TEST_4.strategy: Ensure the world rotation aligns a platform directly under the player. Advance time.
TEST_4.expected: The player's Y position should remain at the platform surface level (radius distance), and `onGround` should be true.

TEST_5.test_description: Verify falling mechanics when the player is over a gap.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Rotate the world so no platform is under the player (offset angle). Advance time.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The player's Y position should decrease (fall towards center or void), and `onGround` should be false.
TEST_5.description: Verify falling mechanics when the player is over a gap.
TEST_5.strategy: Rotate the world so no platform is under the player (offset angle). Advance time.
TEST_5.expected: The player's Y position should decrease (fall towards center or void), and `onGround` should be false.

TEST_6.test_description: Verify gem collection increases the score.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Place a collectible in the player's path and ensure collision.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The gameState score should increase by the collectible's value.
TEST_6.description: Verify gem collection increases the score.
TEST_6.strategy: Place a collectible in the player's path and ensure collision.
TEST_6.expected: The gameState score should increase by the collectible's value.

TEST_7.test_description: Verify Game Over condition upon falling too far.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Allow the player to fall continuously without correcting rotation.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: The gamePhase should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" once the player falls below a threshold.
TEST_7.description: Verify Game Over condition upon falling too far.
TEST_7.strategy: Allow the player to fall continuously without correcting rotation.
TEST_7.expected: The gamePhase should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" once the player falls below a threshold.
